emailVerification.banner: Please verify your email address to access all features.
emailVerification.resendSuccess: Verification email sent. Please check your inbox.
emailVerification.resendError: Failed to resend verification email. Please try again.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action.

confirmation.unsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?

attainmentInfo.triggerLabel: What does this attainment percentage mean?
attainmentInfo.title: Understanding Attainment
attainmentInfo.description: Attainment shows how well you've mastered your course learning outcomes.

welcome.title: Hi, I'm Edi!
welcome.message: I'll be your coach along the way. Let's set up your learning journey together.

assessmentIntro.title: A quick check-in
assessmentIntro.message: Answer honestly — there are no wrong answers here. This helps me personalize your experience.

emptyState.title: Nothing here yet
emptyState.message: This is where things will show up once you get started. Take the first step and I'll cheer you on.

firstXp.title: Your first XP!
firstXp.message: Nice work — you just earned your first experience points. Keep it up and watch your level grow.

firstEnrollment.title: You're enrolled!
firstEnrollment.message: Welcome to your first course. Explore the lessons and I'll help you stay on track.

password.title: Keeping you safe
password.message: Pick a password you'll remember. Tap the eye icon any time to check what you typed.

now.noUpcomingHint: You're all caught up — no classes are scheduled right now.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.subtitle: A read-only view of your upcoming deadlines.
calendar.readOnlyNotice: This calendar is read-only. To add or edit tasks and study sessions, use your Planner and Today views.

parentDashboard.subtitle: Stay connected with your child's learning journey.
parentDashboard.noChildren: No linked children yet. Ask your institution's admin to set up the parent-student link.

accessibility.title: Accessibility Settings
accessibility.cognitiveLoadMessage: This page has a lot of information — would you like a simplified view?

step1.title: Welcome to your dashboard
step1.content: This is your home base. Find notifications, your XP, and your daily streak right here at the top.

step2.title: Your navigation
step2.content: Jump between courses, planner, journal, leaderboard, and more from the sidebar.

step3.title: Daily greeting
step3.content: A quick personal welcome and your most important next action live in this hero card.

step4.title: Your key stats
step4.content: Track XP, level, streak, and habits at a glance — everything that drives your progress.

step5.title: Daily habits
step5.content: Hit Login, Submit, Journal, and Read every day to chase a Perfect Day and unlock bonus XP.

step6.title: XP and streaks
step6.content: Watch your XP climb in real time. Keep your streak alive — every day matters.

step7.title: Profile and settings
step7.content: Switch language, theme, or sign out from your profile menu in the top right.

step1.title: Welcome, teacher
step1.content: This is your control room. Notifications, students, and live activity surface right here at the top.

step2.title: Your tools
step2.content: Open courses, assignments, grading, outcomes, and analytics from the sidebar.

step3.title: Class snapshot
step3.content: See pending grading, attainment trends, and at-risk students at a glance.

step4.title: Define learning outcomes
step4.content: Create CLOs aligned to Bloom's levels — these power every rubric, attainment chart, and report.

step5.title: Build rubrics
step5.content: Drag-and-drop rubric criteria, link them to CLOs, and reuse across assignments.

step6.title: Grading queue
step6.content: Submissions land here in priority order. AI-assisted feedback drafts speed up your turnaround.

step7.title: Language and profile
step7.content: Toggle Arabic or English and access your profile from the top right.

step1.title: Welcome, coordinator
step1.content: Program oversight starts here. Notifications, alerts, and quick actions are at the top.

step2.title: Program tools
step2.content: Manage programs, PLOs, courses, CQI plans, and accreditation reports from the sidebar.

step3.title: Program health
step3.content: Coverage gaps, attainment trends, and at-risk indicators across your programs.

step4.title: Curriculum matrix
step4.content: See which CLOs cover each PLO across courses. Spot gaps and overlaps in seconds.

step5.title: Manage PLOs
step5.content: Create, edit, and weight Program Learning Outcomes — and map them to ILOs.

step6.title: Language and theme
step6.content: Switch between English and Arabic, or toggle dark mode anytime.

step7.title: Profile menu
step7.content: Profile, preferences, and sign out are in the top-right menu.

step1.title: Welcome, parent
step1.content: Stay close to your child's progress. Notifications and alerts are right here at the top.

step2.title: Family hub
step2.content: Access children, progress, attendance, fees, and messages from the sidebar.

step3.title: Child snapshot
step3.content: Quick KPIs across all your linked children — attendance, grades, streaks, and risk signals.

step4.title: Linked children
step4.content: Switch between children to view their individual dashboards in detail.

step5.title: Fees and billing
step5.content: View invoices, payment status, and download receipts whenever you need them.

step6.title: Planner
step6.content: See your child's upcoming assignments and exams so you can plan ahead together.

step7.title: Profile menu
step7.content: Settings, language, and sign-out live in the top-right menu.

step1.title: Welcome, admin
step1.content: Institution-wide controls start here. Live notifications and alerts are at the top.

step2.title: Admin tools
step2.content: Users, programs, settings, audit logs, and analytics are all in the sidebar.

step3.title: Institution health
step3.content: Total users, active courses, average attainment, and at-risk counts at a glance.

step4.title: Primary action
step4.content: Add users, create programs, or trigger bulk imports right from the dashboard header.

step5.title: Section cards
step5.content: Each card here drills into a deeper view — users by role, recent activity, audit trail, and more.

step6.title: Language and theme
step6.content: Toggle Arabic or English and switch dark mode anytime.

step7.title: Profile menu
step7.content: Profile, preferences, and sign-out are in the top-right menu.

common.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

avatar.title: Profile Picture
avatar.description: Upload a photo to personalize your profile.
avatar.dragDrop: Drag and drop an image here
avatar.formats: PNG, JPG, or WebP — max 2 MB
avatar.invalidType: Please upload a PNG, JPG, or WebP image.
avatar.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is 2 MB.

tos.title: Terms of Service
tos.description: Please review and accept our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy to continue using the platform.
tos.checkboxLabel: I have read and agree to the
tos.acceptError: Failed to accept Terms of Service. Please try again.

noCourses.title: No Courses Yet
noCourses.description: Courses will appear here once they are created and assigned.

noProgress.title: No Progress Data
noProgress.description: Start completing activities to track your learning progress.

noUsers.title: No Users Found
noUsers.description: Invite users to your institution to get started.

noNotifications.title: No Notifications
noNotifications.description: You're all caught up! New notifications will appear here.

noBadges.title: No Badges Earned
noBadges.description: Complete challenges and milestones to earn badges.

noEvidence.title: No Evidence Yet
noEvidence.description: Student submissions and assessment evidence will appear here.

noMarketplaceItems.title: No Items Available
noMarketplaceItems.description: Marketplace items will appear here once they are listed.

noLinkedStudents.title: No Linked Students
noLinkedStudents.description: Ask your institution's admin to link student accounts.

noTeams.title: No Teams Yet
noTeams.description: Create teams to organize students into collaborative groups.

noChallenges.title: No Challenges Yet
noChallenges.description: Create challenges to engage students with team-based activities.

noOutcomes.title: No Outcomes Found
noOutcomes.description: Add learning outcomes to begin mapping and analysis.

noQuestions.title: No Questions Yet
noQuestions.description: Add or generate questions to build your question bank.

noResults.title: No Results Yet
noResults.description: Results will appear here once students complete their assessments.

noData.title: No Data Available
noData.description: Data will populate here as activities are completed.

noSessions.title: No Sessions Yet
noSessions.description: Create sessions to begin tracking attendance.

noSurveys.title: No Surveys Yet
noSurveys.description: Create your first survey to collect feedback.

noSemesters.title: No Semesters Yet
noSemesters.description: Create your first semester to get started.

noTimetable.title: No Timetable Slots
noTimetable.description: Add timetable slots to organize the schedule.

noResponses.title: No Responses Yet
noResponses.description: Responses will appear here once participants submit.

noAssignments.title: No Assignments Yet
noAssignments.description: Assignments will appear here once they are created.

noCLOs.title: No CLOs Found
noCLOs.description: Course learning outcomes will appear here once created.

noPLOs.title: No PLOs Created
noPLOs.description: Ask your coordinator to create program learning outcomes first.

noILOs.title: No ILOs Created
noILOs.description: Ask your admin to create institutional learning outcomes first.

noRubrics.title: No Rubrics Yet
noRubrics.description: Create rubrics to standardize your grading criteria.

noActionPlans.title: No Action Plans Yet
noActionPlans.description: Create a CQI action plan to start closing the loop.

noAttendance.title: No Attendance Records
noAttendance.description: Create sessions and mark attendance to see records here.

noXPData.title: No XP Data Yet
noXPData.description: Start earning XP to see your personal best here.

noImprovementData.title: No Improvement Data
noImprovementData.description: Keep earning XP to see who is improving the most.

noLeaderboardData.title: No Leaderboard Data
noLeaderboardData.description: Leaderboard entries will appear as students earn XP.

noCorrelationData.title: No Correlation Data
noCorrelationData.description: CLO correlation data will appear once quizzes are completed.

noBloomsData.title: No Bloom's Data
noBloomsData.description: Bloom's level distribution will appear as quiz data is collected.

noUsageData.title: No Usage Data
noUsageData.description: Usage trends will appear as students interact with the tutor.

noCitationData.title: No Citation Data
noCitationData.description: Material citations will appear as the AI Tutor references content.

noAttainmentData.title: No Attainment Data
noAttainmentData.description: CLO attainment will appear as assessments are completed.
